summary: Audience recording of a powerful Dark Star > Morning Dew sequence, but the sound quality is poor
review: The show shines on the Dark Star into Morning Dew jam, with the music’s intensity cutting through an unremarkable recording. Reviewers overwhelmingly criticize the audio – calling it muffled, pocket‑recorded and almost unusable – while one fan still praises the performance despite the technical flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Three reviews give a wide star spread (5, 2, 0) and all flag serious recording problems; only one mentions the music positively, leading to a low‑average rating with moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as unexceptional, muffled, pocket‑recorded, and “complete shit”; lacks clarity and has abrasive early‑70s soundboard qualities.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on overall flow; only the Dark Star > Morning Dew sequence is highlighted.
